si.t: View Through A Closed Window - GuyR
You Don't Need Me - Simon Rose
A Call From The Other Side - Jad0, Simon Rose

For Zalmanim and listeners worldwide, A new track by Maor Azoulay is a very joyous event. In this dreamy track, Maor, in his unique style, mixes different and strange genres and brings something new, interesting, and unexpected.

r.t: A Call From The Other Side

si.t: Hello how are you? It is a great pleasure to greet you! I love their selections and a lot of the music they have! I want to collaborate with you if you like what I create with care and enthusiasm from my humility and my charisma…. Looking forward to growing among the best...!
Hello! I would love if you can release these singles that I sent you! I hope you like it a big greeting

I don't have any TikTok or Facebook. Thank you .
Lumy Gard
I want to release my new album Boys Fire (Vol11) (2025)
Pondok Ungu Permai, Block Ad 8 No. 15, RT.4/RW.10, Village of Happy Village, Babelan (17612) BABELAN, DISTRICT. BEKASI, WEST JAVA, ID, 17612
Promo and Spotify playlisting service distribution
I'm sending you the file via WhatsApp, because it's over 100 megabytes in zip.

Not a breath, not a sound except at intervals the muffled crackling of stones that the cold was reducing to sand disturbed the solitude and silence surrounding Janine. After a moment, however, it seemed to her that the sky above her was moving" Albert Camus "Exile and the Kingdom
Embark on a journey through the land of the desert.

- Twitter: https://x.com/66Castel67568 - Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/castel66musik/ - Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/castelmusik66/ - Website: https://castel66.my.canva.site/ - YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@castel66 - soundcloud:https://soundcloud.com/castel66-official - Wikipedia:https://id.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pengguna:AdeHatta88 - TikTok:https://www.tiktok.com/@castmusic66?lang=en - Spotify:https://open.spotify.com/artist/5MlZhL40mYzMRcmAGdhRVa - Sun Rise:https://open.spotify.com/track/3wW3a4BsU07Ao04WrMymmk?si=ee7ee87d0a7c4599 - Traxsource:https://www.traxsource.com/track/13014902/sun-rise - Vevo : https://www.youtube.com/@Castel66Vevo
please check the master on the track with the limiter .

Unleash pure Energy with this high-octane techtrance banger! Packed with driving basslines, sharp synths, and relentless rhythmic power, this track is designed to ignite dancefloors and keep the adrenaline pumping. With a hypnotic build-up and explosive drops, Energy is a must-have for fans of peak-time trance and underground rave vibes.

Step into the high-energy realm of Hypomanic, a track that fuses pulsating basslines, hypnotic melodies, and an electrifying buildup. Designed for peak-time club moments, this track delivers an intense, euphoric rush with deep, driving grooves and a captivating atmosphere. Perfect for techtrance and trance lovers who crave a sonic journey filled with tension and release

Get ready for a raw and electrifying experience with Durty! This track delivers dirty basslines, punchy kicks, and dark hypnotic synths, creating a high-energy vibe perfect for underground raves and peak-time club sets. With an intense progression and a deep, driving groove, Durty is a must-have for techtrance and drum&bass lovers.

Dive into a hypnotic energy with You Keep, a track that blends pounding basslines, mesmerizing synths, and a progressive buildup crafted for the dancefloor. With an immersive atmosphere and powerful kicks, this track is designed to captivate fans of techtrance and underground techno. 🎶🔥
Dubioza kolektiv -One more time remix by(Sefer Semir )
Dubioza kolektiv -One more time -remix by Sefer Semir
Listen to Sefer Semir-One more time (Dubioza kolektiv) remix by Sefer Semir on #SoundCloud https://on.soundcloud.com/DendMbXPq2b7EPAz6
I would love if you can release this single that I sent you! I hope you like it a big greeting

Portuguese - PT/BR
🌌 "Ram Da Ram" chegou para expandir sua mente e vibrar sua alma! 🔥
Prepare-se para uma jornada sonora que pulsa em cada célula do seu corpo. Com um baixo pesado e constante, um kick forte que ressoa como batidas do universo, e uma progressão psicodélica lenta que desenrola paisagens sinestésicas a cada compasso, "Ram Da Ram" vai te transportar para outra dimensão.
O toque final? Um vocal indiano memorável que ressoa como um mantra hipnótico, fazendo você se conectar ao âmago do som.
⚡️ Dê o play, entregue-se ao ritmo, e sinta a vibração transformar você. A experiência já está disponível em todas as plataformas de streaming e redes sociais.
🌠 A transcendência começa aqui. Vai encarar? #RamDaRam #PsytranceVibes #BassAndSoul #ViagemPsicodélica
English
🌌 "Ram Da Ram" is here to expand your mind and ignite your soul! 🔥
Get ready for a sonic journey that vibrates through every cell in your body. With a heavy, steady bass, a powerful kick resonating like the universe’s heartbeat, and a slow, sinesthetic psychedelic progression unfolding vivid soundscapes at every beat, "Ram Da Ram" will transport you to another dimension.
The final touch? An unforgettable Indian vocal resonating like a hypnotic mantra, connecting you to the essence of the sound.
⚡️ Hit play, surrender to the rhythm, and feel the vibrations transform you. The experience is now live on all streaming platforms and social media.
🌠 Transcendence begins here. Ready to dive in? #RamDaRam #PsytranceVibes #BassAndSoul #PsychedelicJourney

Dj for over 25 years, the co-founder of "Made.festival" he has shared the decks with the greatest artists on the international scene in a number of clubs and festivals... His music is at once sultry, indie and disco inspired by the synth pop of Human League, the disco of Gorgio Moroder and the new wave of New Order. Today he is also a resident DJ at "moon" evenings dedicated to indie dance, dark disco and other cosmic music. Since 2024 he has founded his own label (M.I.R musique) to highlight the sound of "moon" evenings.
ttps://www.facebook.com/jabba-23-209955349028007 https://www.instagram.com/jabba23/ https://soundcloud.com/jabba-2-3
